description: Vague predicate ("successful") with no operational definition. Reviewers fail MECE and atomic_claims, routing blocks finalize.

input.question: Will the next iPhone be successful?

reviews.reviewProse: The term 'successful' is not operationally defined. Without a concrete metric (unit sales, revenue, review score) the market cannot be resolved mechanically.

rubricVotes.rationale: Success has no threshold so Yes/No cannot partition the space.
No source named for measuring success.
No edge case for partial success.

criticisms.rationale: 'Successful' is undefined — define an explicit numerical threshold.
Yes win condition depends on undefined term.

judgeDecision.rationale: The draft's central predicate is undefined; four of six rubric items fail.
